tagline: Sync comments from external data sources to Unity Catalog.
what_it_does: This feature allows Lakehouse Federation to sync table and column comments from supported external data sources to foreign tables in Unity Catalog. The synced comments are accessible in table metadata, including Catalog Explorer and through SQL commands like `DESCRIBE` and `DESCRIBE EXTENDED`. Comments are updated dynamically when the foreign table metadata is resolved during query execution.
why_it_matters: This update enhances data governance and usability by ensuring that metadata is consistent and up-to-date across different data sources. It benefits data analysts and engineers by providing clearer context and documentation directly within the data platform, improving productivity and reducing the risk of misinterpretation of data assets.
plain_summary: This feature allows Lakehouse Federation to sync table and column comments from supported external data sources to foreign tables in Unity Catalog. The synced comments are accessible in table metadata, including Catalog Explorer and through SQL commands like…

capabilities.title: Dynamic Comment Syncing
capabilities.desc: Automatically syncs comments from external data sources to foreign tables.

capabilities.title: Metadata Accessibility
capabilities.desc: Synced comments are visible in Catalog Explorer and SQL outputs.

capabilities.title: Query-Time Updates
capabilities.desc: Comments are updated when resolving foreign table metadata during queries.

capabilities.title: Support for Multiple Sources
capabilities.desc: Compatible with various external data sources like AWS Glue, Google BigQuery, and Snowflake.

prerequisites: SQL warehouse on Databricks SQL version 2026.15 or above
use_cases: Enhancing data documentation for analytics teams.
Improving data governance across multiple data sources.
Facilitating better collaboration between data engineers and analysts.
limitations: Comments are not synced for Azure Synapse, Databricks-to-Databricks, Microsoft SQL Server, and Salesforce Data 360.

steps.title: Enable Feature
steps.desc: Workspace admins can enable this feature from the Previews page.

steps.title: Check Compatibility
steps.desc: Ensure you are using the required Databricks Runtime or SQL warehouse version.

steps.title: Query Foreign Tables
steps.desc: Run queries on foreign tables to fetch synced comments.

steps.title: Use DESCRIBE EXTENDED
steps.desc: Execute `DESCRIBE EXTENDED <catalog-name>.<schema-name>.<table-name>;` to sync comments without querying data.

steps.title: Monitor Updates
steps.desc: Check for updated comments during subsequent queries.

key_takeaway: The ability to sync comments on foreign tables enhances metadata management and improves data usability across platforms.
